testcase.name: @AfterClass tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchSessionException: Session ID is null. Using WebDriver after calling quit()? Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, close {}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.168, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.167 (65db666ac2c..., userDataDir: C:\Users\suraj\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57988}, goog:processID: 504, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57988/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.168, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} at org.openqa.selenium.remote.HttpCommandExecutor.execute(HttpCommandExecutor.java:176) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverCommandExecutor.invokeExecute(DriverCommandExecutor.java:216) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverCommandExecutor.execute(DriverCommandExecutor.java:174) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:544) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:617) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:621) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.close(RemoteWebDriver.java:417) at may19_TestNG.BaseClass.tearDown(BaseClass.java:60) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 24 stack frames

testcase.name: @AfterClass tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchSessionException: Session ID is null. Using WebDriver after calling quit()?
